Bash(cd "/mnt/c/Users/roryu/Build Google Maps Lead Scraper" && echo "=== Today's 20 calls initiated ===" && cat logs/call_attempts.jsonl | python3 -c "
import json, sys
for i, line in enumerate\(sys.stdin, 1\):
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if not line: continue
    d = json.loads\(line\)
    call_id = d.get\('call_id','?'\)
    print\(f'{i:2d}. {d.get\(\\"name\\",\\"?\\"\):45s} | call_id={call_id}'\)
" && echo "" && echo "=== Matching call_ids from call_attempts against calls.jsonl ===" && python3 -c "
import json
attempts = []
with open\('logs/call_attempts.jsonl'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.strip\(\): attempts.append\(json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)\)
reports = []
with open\('logs/calls.jsonl'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.strip\(\): reports.append\(json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\)\)
report_ids = {r.get\('call_id'\) for r in reports}
print\(f'Calls initiated: {len\(attempts\)}'\)
print\(f'End-of-call reports received: {len\(reports\)}'\)
matched = [a for a in attempts if a.get\('call_id'\) in report_ids]
unmatched = [a for a in attempts if a.get\('call_id'\) not in report_ids]
print\(f'Matched \(got webhook back\): {len\(matched\)}'\)
print\(f'MISSING reports \(no webhook received\): {len\(unmatched\)}'\)
if unmatched:
    print\(\)
    print\('=== Calls with NO end-of-call report ==='\)
    for a in unmatched:
        print\(f'  - {a.get\(\\"name\\",\\"?\\"\):45s} | {a.get\(\\"phone\\",\\"?\\"\)} | call_id={a.get\(\\"call_id\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)
")
